issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation toggle does not update aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The mobileNav.toggle function opens and closes the mobile navigation drawer but never sets aria‑expanded on the trigger button (`.nav-toggle`). Screen‑reader users cannot know whether the menu is open.
issuesFound.fix:
In mobileNav.open and mobileNav.close add:
    ```js
    setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');   // on open
    setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false'); // on close
    ```

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion panel open does not set aria‑expanded to true
issuesFound.explanation: faqAccordion.open adds the open class and animates the panel, but never updates aria‑expanded on the trigger button to true. Users of assistive technology cannot tell that the answer is revealed.
issuesFound.fix:
At the start of open add:
    ```js
    setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');
    ```

issuesFound.title: Inline form validation does not set aria‑invalid on error fields
issuesFound.explanation: inlineValidator.validate calls srUtils.markInvalid, which only adds aria‑describedby but never sets aria‑invalid="true". WCAG 2.2 requires the invalid state to be conveyed via aria‑invalid.
issuesFound.fix:
In srUtils.markInvalid add:
    ```js
    field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'true');
    ```
    And in srUtils.markValid remove the attribute.

issuesFound.title: Inline form validation does not clear aria‑invalid on valid fields
issuesFound.explanation: srUtils.markValid removes aria‑describedby but does not remove aria‑invalid when a field becomes valid, leaving the invalid state lingering.
issuesFound.fix:
In srUtils.markValid add:
    ```js
    field.removeAttribute('aria-invalid');
    ```

issuesFound.explanation: The .btn class includes transform in its transition property and applies transform: translateY(1px) on :active, causing spatial movement. issuesFound.title: mobileNav.open does not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The open() function toggles the navigation drawer visibility by adding CSS classes but fails to update the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button to reflect the expanded state. Screen readers will not announce the menu as expanded.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1320: Add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` immediately after `addClass(_drawer, CONFIG.navigation.openClass || CSS.open);`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.close does not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The close() function hides the navigation drawer but does not set aria-expanded="false" on the trigger button, leaving screen readers with stale state information that the menu is still expanded.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1340: Add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` immediately after `removeClass(_drawer, CONFIG.navigation.openClass || CSS.open);`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.init missing aria-expanded initialization
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation initializes, the trigger button does not have aria-expanded set to "false" to indicate the closed state on page load, violating the requirement that ARIA states reflect the initial visible state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1390: After `_trigger = qs(SELECTORS.navToggle);` and `_drawer = qs(SELECTORS.navDrawer || SELECTORS.primaryNav);`, add `if (_trigger && _drawer) { setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false'); const drawerId = srUtils.ensureId(_drawer, 'mobile-nav'); setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-controls', drawerId); }`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.open missing focus management
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile menu opens, focus is not moved into the drawer, trapping keyboard users at the trigger button and preventing access to the navigation links.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1320: After `addClass(_drawer, CONFIG.navigation.openClass || CSS.open);`, add `const firstFocusable = getFocusableChildren(_drawer)[0] || _drawer; if (firstFocusable) firstFocusable.focus({ preventScroll: true });`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.close missing focus return
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile menu closes, focus is not returned to the trigger button, disorienting keyboard users who expect focus to return to the control that opened the dialog.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1340: After `removeClass(_drawer, CONFIG.navigation.openClass || CSS.open);`, add `if (_trigger) _trigger.focus({ preventScroll: true });`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.open missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Opening the navigation menu changes the visible content significantly but does not announce the state change to screen readers via a live region.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1320: After opening the drawer, add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.navOpen || 'Navigation menu opened');`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.close missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Closing the navigation menu is not announced to screen readers, leaving users unaware that the menu has collapsed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1340: After closing the drawer, add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.navClosed || 'Navigation menu closed');`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._openInstance does not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The function reveals the dropdown panel but fails to set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button, so screen readers do not announce the expanded state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1470: Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` immediately after `inst.panel.removeAttribute('hidden');`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._closeInstance does not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The function hides the dropdown panel but does not set aria-expanded="false" on the trigger button, causing screen readers to incorrectly report the menu as still expanded.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1485: Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` immediately after `removeClass(inst.panel, CSS.open);`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu.register missing aria-expanded initialization
issuesFound.explanation: When dropdown instances are registered, the trigger button lacks aria-expanded="false" to indicate the initial closed state, and lacks aria-controls linking to the panel.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1440: After `panel.setAttribute('hidden', '');`, add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false'); if (!trigger.getAttribute('aria-controls')) { const panelId = srUtils.ensureId(panel, 'dropdown-panel'); setAttr(trigger, 'aria-controls', panelId); }`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._openInstance missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Opening a dropdown menu changes visible content but is not announced to screen readers via a live region.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1470: After `inst.panel.removeAttribute('hidden');`, add `liveRegion.announce('Menu opened');`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._closeInstance missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Closing the dropdown menu is not announced to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1485: After `removeClass(inst.panel, CSS.open);`, add `liveRegion.announce('Menu closed');`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion.open does not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The function expands the FAQ answer panel but does not set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button, preventing screen readers from announcing the expanded state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2920: Add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` immediately after `item.open = true;`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion.close does not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The function collapses the FAQ answer panel but does not set aria-expanded="false" on the trigger button.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2940: Add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` immediately after `item.open = false;`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion.init missing aria-expanded initialization
issuesFound.explanation: During initialization, FAQ trigger buttons that are closed do not have aria-expanded="false" set to reflect their initial state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2990: In the initialization loop where items are processed, after `const shouldBeOpen = item.open;`, add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', String(shouldBeOpen));`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion.open missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Expanding an FAQ item changes visible content but is not announced to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2920: After `open(item, false);` (or after setting aria-expanded), add `liveRegion.announce((STRINGS.announce.faqOpened || '{title} expanded').replace('{title}', item.title || item.question));`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion.close missing live region announcement

issuesFound.title: pricing._syncToggleState missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The billing period toggle buttons act as two-state toggles but do not update aria-pressed to indicate the active state to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2640: Inside the forEach loop, after `toggleClass(btn, CSS.active, isActive);`, add `setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', String(isActive));`

issuesFound.title: pricing.setPeriod missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Changing the billing period updates prices throughout the page but does not announce the change or the new prices to screen readers.
